message:
test(rch): respect CARGO_TARGET_DIR in all E2E test harnesses

Applies the same CARGO_TARGET_DIR fix from daemon_lifecycle.rs to all
remaining E2E test files:

- rchd/tests/e2e_daemon.rs
- rchd/tests/e2e_multi_worker.rs
- rchd/tests/e2e_pipeline.rs
- rchd/tests/e2e_worker.rs
- tests/true_e2e/failopen_tests.rs (both rch_binary_path and rchd_binary_path)

Each test harness now checks CARGO_TARGET_DIR before falling back to the
default project_root/target/debug location. This ensures tests work when:
- Using shared target directories across multiple projects
- Running builds with --target-dir flag
- Using cargo workspace overrides
- CI systems that redirect target directories

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
